message: 🌱 Add kmesh: The number tag of config_type fields in Filter proto can mission (#681)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kmesh-702-the-number-tag-of-config-type-fields-in-filter-proto-can-not-exceeds-3",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kmesh: The number tag of config_type fields in Filter proto can not exceeds 3.",
+    "description": "The number tag of config_type fields in Filter proto can not exceeds 3.. Requested by 0+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kmesh deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your kmesh version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kmesh -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kmesh\nhelm list -n kmesh 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working kmesh installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kmesh configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kmesh configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kmesh -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kmesh\nkubectl get configmap -n kmesh -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kmesh\n```\n**Please provide an in-depth description of the question you have**:\nHi, I was trying to add a local_rate_limit field inside the Filter message."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for The number tag of config_type fields in Filter proto can",
+        "description": "The cgo using gcc to compile *.h files, where the libkmesh_api_v2_c.so using clang which may have conflicts.\n\n```\nroot:/app# docker run -it ghcr.io/kmesh-net/kmesh-build:latest sh\nsh-5.2# go env\n...\nCC='gcc'\nCXX='g++'\n```\n```yaml\nmessage Filter {\n  string name = 1;\n  oneof config_type {\n    filter.TcpProxy tcp_proxy = 2;\n    filter.HttpConnectionManager http_connection_manager = 3;\n    filter.LocalRateLimit local_rate_limit = 4;\n  }\n}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kmesh -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kmesh\nkubectl get events -n kmesh --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"The number tag of config_type fields in Filter proto can\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The cgo using gcc to compile *.h files, where the libkmesh_api_v2_c.so using clang which may have conflicts.\n\n```\nroot:/app# docker run -it ghcr.io/kmesh-net/kmesh-build:latest sh\nsh-5.2# go env\n...\nCC='gcc'\nCXX='g++'\n```",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "message Filter {\n  string name = 1;\n  oneof config_type {\n    filter.TcpProxy tcp_proxy = 2;\n    filter.HttpConnectionManager http_connection_manager = 3;\n    filter.LocalRateLimit local_rate_limit = 4;\n  }\n}",
+        "<!--\nAdd one of the following kinds:\n\n/kind bug\n/kind cleanup\n/kind enhancement\n/kind security\n/kind documentation\n/kind feature\n\n-->\n\n**What this PR does / why we need it**:\n\n**Which issue(s) this PR fixes**:\nFixes #702\n\n**Special notes for your reviewer**:\n\n**Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?**:\n<!--\nIf no, just write \"NONE\" in the release-note block below.\nIf yes, a release note is required.\n-->",
+        "make gen:\napi/v2-c/listener/listener_components.pb-c.h"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "kmesh",
+      "sandbox",

+    ],

+    },

+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl"
+    ],
